text: Before lifting a lifeboat from the water back to its davits, it must be ensured that:

options.text: The engine is still running at full speed
Falls are clear and secured tightly (hooked securely)
The drain plug is wide open

explanation: For the safe recovery of a lifeboat, it is critical to ensure that the falls are properly secured to the hooks and the release gear is in the correct position to prevent accidental disengagement during hoisting.
